goal: Review the codebase for mechanisms that support maintaining conversation coherence across multiple threads.

plan_steps.description: Identify all files related to conversation management in the codebase.
acceptance_criteria: List of file paths containing keywords like 'conversation', 'thread', or 'coherence'.

plan_steps.description: Review identified files to understand how conversation coherence is maintained across multiple threads.
acceptance_criteria: Summary of mechanisms used for maintaining conversation coherence, including relevant code snippets and explanations.

plan_steps.description: Analyze the identified mechanisms to assess their effectiveness in supporting conversation coherence.
acceptance_criteria: Assessment of the effectiveness of each mechanism, highlighting strengths and weaknesses.

plan_steps.description: Document findings on mechanisms that support maintaining conversation coherence across multiple threads.
acceptance_criteria: A written document summarizing the review process, identified mechanisms, and their effectiveness assessment.

plan_steps.description: Propose improvements or additional features to enhance conversation coherence across multiple threads.
acceptance_criteria: A list of proposed improvements or new features with justifications for each.

spoken_summary: I wasn't able to review the codebase because I hit a tool error right away — the run command isn't available to me. Can you point me to where the code is or let me know what tools I should be using instead?
